title: Skillet Chicken with Crunchy Citrusy Argentinian Crunch
description: A flavorful and crunchy chicken dish with a twist of citrusy Argentinian flair.

ingredients.name: citrusy Argentinian seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Latin American markets or online

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with citrusy Argentinian seasoning blend, salt, and black pepper.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated skillet and sear the chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken breast to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet and sauté the garlic for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the crunchy Argentinian bread crumbs to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until golden brown.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Serve the chicken breast with the crunchy Argentinian bread crumbs and lemon sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional citrusy Argentinian seasoning blend, if desired.
